# Mobile Fauna  

## Brachiopods  
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(13)
```

## Crustaceans
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 29:33){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Echinoderms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 34:51){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Fish
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 52:54){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Jellies
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 61:64){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Molluscs
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 67:72){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Seaspiders
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(88)
```

## Worms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 127:135){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
